scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,blue "php -S localhost:8000 -t api/public" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
scripts.prod: pnpm build && concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,blue "php -S localhost:8000 -t api/public" "php -S localhost:5173 -t frontend/dist"
scripts.generate: php api/vendor/bin/openapi api/src --format json -o openapi.json && pnpm --dir frontend exec openapi-typescript ../openapi.json -o src/types/api.generated.ts
